title: Trouble Diagnosis Quick Reference (1)

rows.suspected_parts: Brake switch circuit; Vehicle speed signal circuit
rows.action: Check or replace the appropriate part

rows.suspected_parts: Slip ring contaminated by oil; Clutch is overheated (excessive clutch circuit resistance); Vehicle speed sensor circuit
rows.action: Check the clutch circuit and vehicle speed signal

rows.suspected_parts: Stall test — If stall speed is high, the clutch torque decreases
Stall test — If stall speed is normal, the N-CVT pulley is fixed in the overdrive position
Stall test — If stall speed is low, the engine torque decreases or clutch torque becomes too high
rows.action: Check engine; Check or replace the electromagnetic clutch

rows.suspected_parts: There is a short-circuit between the electromagnetic clutch circuit negative side (-) and ground

rows.trouble_description: Engine speed is uneven at constant speeds over 30 km/h
rows.suspected_parts: There is an abnormal decrease in clutch torque; Vehicle speed signal is faulty
rows.action: Check electromagnetic clutch; Check vehicle speed sensor circuit

rows.trouble_description: There is a sharp shock when the accelerator pedal is depressed from the released position between 10 and 20 km/h
rows.suspected_parts: Shift characteristics are incorrect for low speeds

rows.trouble_description: The clutch does not disengage readily when decelerating
rows.suspected_parts: Vehicle speed signal circuit is faulty
rows.action: Check the vehicle speed signal system

rows.trouble_description: The clutch disengages when the accelerator pedal is released when driving faster than 20 km/h
rows.suspected_parts: The brake switch circuit is faulty (malfunctions by staying ON); The ABS operation signal circuit is faulty
rows.action: Check the brake switch; Check the ABS operation signal circuit

rows.trouble_description: The clutch disengages when the brake pedal is depressed in Ds range
rows.suspected_parts: Brake switch circuit is faulty (malfunctions by staying OFF)

model_notes: N-CVT transaxle specific trouble diagnosis. Applies to Nissan Micra K11 with N-CVT automatic transmission.
